data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for status controls in provisioning and deprovisioning flows.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the status controls for provisioning and deprovisioning flows, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement has been satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for these controls, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or reads related to this aspect. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of status controls for provisioning and deprovisioning flows being validated or retrieved.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the status controls for provisioning and deprovisioning flows.
